Here is a comprehensive summary of everything found in this project:

---

## Project: "NYM" — ICE Tracker

### 1. What Is This Project?

**ICE Tracker** is a crowdsourced, anonymous vehicle sighting tracker designed to let people report and track sightings of vehicles belonging to federal law enforcement agencies — primarily ICE (Immigration and Customs Enforcement), but also CBP, DHS, FBI, DEA, ATF, and USMS. It is a **civic/activist app** built as a React Native + Expo web application (runs on the web only in its current optimized form, though the codebase targets iOS/Android too). The app is fully anonymous — no user accounts required for reporting or voting.

---

### 2. Tech Stack

**Runtime & Framework**
- **Expo SDK 54** (`expo-router ~6` for file-based routing) + **React Native 0.81.5 / React 19**
- **NativeWind v4** (Tailwind CSS for React Native)
- **Tailwind CSS 3.4**
- Cross-platform: primarily web-first given the web APIs used (Geolocation API, Notification API, FileReader, MediaDevices)

**Backend**
- **Node.js + Express 4** (custom server in `server/_core/index.ts`)
- **tRPC v11** (type-safe API layer, no REST endpoints)
- **Drizzle ORM** with **MySQL2** driver (connecting to a MySQL/TiDB database)
- **esbuild** for production server bundling

**AI/LLM**
- **Gemini 2.5 Flash** via Manus Forge API (`forge.manus.im/v1/chat/completions`) — used for ALPR (license plate recognition) and full vehicle/agency AI analysis
- Multimodal: accepts image URLs for vision tasks

**Frontend Libraries**
- **Leaflet.js** + **react-leaflet** + `leaflet.heat` + `leaflet.markercluster` — interactive maps
- **@tanstack/react-query v5** + **tRPC React Query** — data fetching
- **Zod v4** — schema validation
- **superjson** — tRPC serialization
- **expo-notifications**, **expo-camera**, **expo-location**, **expo-image-picker**

**Dev Tools**
- **pnpm 9.12.0** (package manager)
- **Vitest** (testing)
- **tsx** (dev server TypeScript execution with watch mode)
- **concurrently** (runs server + metro bundler together)
- **drizzle-kit** (DB migrations)
- **TypeScript ~5.9**

---

### 3. Folder Structure

```
nym/
├── app/                        # Expo Router pages (file-based routing)
│   ├── _layout.tsx             # Root layout (tRPC provider, theme)
│   ├── (tabs)/
│   │   ├── _layout.tsx         # Tab bar layout (Map + Sightings tabs)
│   │   ├── index.tsx           # MAP SCREEN (main screen)
│   │   └── sightings.tsx       # SIGHTINGS LIST screen (3 tabs: Recent/Trending/Convoys)
│   ├── camera.tsx              # Camera capture screen
│   ├── submit.tsx              # Submission form screen
│   ├── sighting/[id].tsx       # Sighting detail screen
│   ├── plate/[licensePlate].tsx # Plate tracking screen (movement timeline)
│   ├── widget.tsx              # Embeddable iframe map widget
│   ├── oauth/callback.tsx      # OAuth callback handler
│   └── dev/theme-lab.tsx       # Dev theme testing page
├── components/
│   ├── leaflet-map.tsx         # Leaflet map wrapper component
│   ├── screen-container.tsx    # Safe-area screen wrapper
│   ├── themed-view.tsx
│   ├── parallax-scroll-view.tsx
│   ├── haptic-tab.tsx
│   ├── external-link.tsx
│   ├── hello-wave.tsx
│   └── ui/
│       ├── icon-symbol.tsx      # SF Symbols (iOS) + fallback
│       ├── icon-symbol.ios.tsx
│       └── collapsible.tsx
├── server/                     # Express + tRPC backend
│   ├── routers.ts              # ALL API routes (tRPC procedures)
│   ├── db.ts                   # Database query helpers
│   ├── storage.ts              # S3-compatible file upload helpers
│   ├── README.md               # Backend dev guide
│   └── _core/                  # Framework internals (don't touch)
│       ├── index.ts            # Express app entry point
│       ├── trpc.ts             # tRPC server setup
│       ├── context.ts          # tRPC context (req/res/user)
│       ├── env.ts              # Environment variable config
│       ├── llm.ts              # LLM invocation helper (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
│       ├── auth.ts             # Manus OAuth logic
│       ├── oauth.ts            # OAuth helpers
│       ├── cookies.ts          # Session cookie helpers
│       ├── imageGeneration.ts  # Image generation helper
│       ├── voiceTranscription.ts # Whisper transcription helper
│       ├── notification.ts     # Owner notification helper
│       ├── dataApi.ts          # External data API helpers
│       ├── sdk.ts              # Platform SDK
│       ├── systemRouter.ts     # System tRPC router
│       └── types/
├── drizzle/
│   ├── schema.ts               # DB schema definitions
│   ├── relations.ts            # Table relationships
│   ├── 0000_*.sql → 0002_*.sql # Migration history
│   └── meta/                   # Drizzle migration snapshots
├── hooks/
│   ├── use-auth.ts             # Auth state hook
│   ├── use-colors.ts           # Theme color hook
│   ├── use-color-scheme.ts     # Dark/light mode
│   ├── use-color-scheme.web.ts # Web-specific color scheme
│   └── use-proximity-alerts.ts # Browser notification hook for nearby sightings
├── lib/
│   ├── trpc.ts                 # tRPC React client
│   ├── notifications.ts        # Browser push notification + watched plates
│   ├── sightings-cache.ts      # AsyncStorage offline cache
│   ├── device-id.ts            # Anonymous device fingerprint
│   ├── utils.ts
│   ├── theme-provider.tsx
│   └── _core/                  # Framework internals
│       ├── api.ts
│       ├── auth.ts
│       ├── manus-runtime.ts
│       ├── nativewind-pressable.ts
│       └── theme.ts
├── constants/
│   ├── const.ts                # App constants
│   ├── oauth.ts                # OAuth URLs/config
│   └── theme.ts                # Color tokens
├── shared/
│   ├── const.ts                # Shared constants (cookie name, etc.)
│   ├── types.ts                # Shared TypeScript types
│   └── _core/errors.ts
├── tests/
│   ├── alpr.test.ts            # ALPR endpoint tests
│   ├── api.test.ts             # API route tests
│   └── auth.logout.test.ts     # Auth logout tests
├── scripts/
│   ├── generate_qr.mjs         # QR code generator for dev
│   ├── load-env.js
│   └── reset-project.js
├── assets/images/              # App icons, splash screen
├── design.md                   # Full UI/UX design spec
├── todo.md                     # Feature checklist (mostly complete)
├── drizzle.config.ts
├── app.config.ts               # Expo app config
├── tailwind.config.js
├── babel.config.js
├── metro.config.js
├── tsconfig.json
├── global.css
└── package.json
```

---

### 4. Screens / Routes

| Route | Screen | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/` (tabs/index) | Map Screen | Full-screen Leaflet map with sighting markers, search, agency filters, heatmap, FAB |
| `/sightings` (tabs/sightings) | Sightings List | 3-tab view: Recent sightings list (swipe-to-vote), Trending plates (24h), Convoy alerts |
| `/camera` | Camera Screen | Browser MediaDevices API camera capture with GPS |
| `/submit` | Submit Form | Photo preview, AI auto-extracted plate, vehicle type picker, location, notes |
| `/sighting/[id]` | Sighting Detail | Full photo, AI analysis panel, credibility panel, voting, embedded map, share |
| `/plate/[licensePlate]` | Plate Tracker | Movement timeline with connecting arrows, distance stats, map, watch/notify |
| `/widget` | Map Widget | Minimal embeddable iframe map for third-party sites |
| `/oauth/callback` | OAuth Callback | Handles Manus OAuth redirect |
| `/dev/theme-lab` | Theme Lab | Development theme testing |

---

### 5. Database Schema

Three tables in **MySQL/TiDB** via Drizzle ORM:

**`users`** — Backing auth (Manus OAuth):
- `id`, `openId` (unique OAuth identifier), `name`, `email`, `loginMethod`, `role` (user/admin), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `lastSignedIn`

**`sightings`** — Core data table:
- `id`, `licensePlate`, `vehicleType`, `photoUrl`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `locationAccuracy`, `locationAddress`, `notes`, `photoMetadata` (EXIF JSON)
- `deviceId` (anonymous device fingerprint)
- **AI-extracted fields**: `agencyType` (ICE/CBP/DHS/FBI/DEA/ATF/USMS/Other), `agencyMarkings`, `vehicleMake`, `vehicleModel`, `vehicleColor`, `badgeNumber`, `uniformDescription`, `aiConfidence`
- **Credibility fields**: `upvotes`, `downvotes`, `flagCount`, `credibilityScore`, `isHidden` (auto-hidden if credibility < 40% with ≥5 votes)
- Indexes on: `licensePlate`, `(latitude, longitude)`, `credibilityScore`, `createdAt`

**`votes`** — Anonymous voting:
- `id`, `sightingId`, `deviceId`, `voteType` (upvote/downvote/flag), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
- Unique index on `(deviceId, sightingId)` — one vote per device per sighting

---

### 6. API Routes (tRPC)

All routes are under `/api/trpc`. All routes are **public** (no auth required — anonymous app):

| Router | Procedure | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `auth.me` | query | Get current user |
| `auth.logout` | mutation | Clear session cookie |
| `sightings.list` | query | Get all sightings (limit/offset/minCredibility/hideHidden filters) |
| `sightings.getById` | query | Get single sighting |
| `sightings.create` | mutation | Create sighting + upload photo to S3 |
| `sightings.search` | query | Search by license plate |
| `sightings.nearby` | query | Get sightings within radius (Haversine) |
| `vehicleAI.analyzePhoto` | mutation | **AI**: Full vehicle + agency analysis from photo URL |
| `alpr.extractPlate` | mutation | **AI**: Extract license plate text from photo |
| `plates.getByPlate` | query | All sightings for a specific plate |
| `plates.listAll` | query | All tracked plates with sighting counts |
| `convoy.detect` | query | Detect multi-vehicle clusters in same area/time window |
| `trending.plates` | query | Most-reported plates in last 24h |
| `votes.getUserVote` | query | Get device's vote for a sighting |
| `votes.cast` | mutation | Cast/update vote (upvote/downvote/flag) |
| `votes.remove` | mutation | Remove a vote |
| `votes.getCounts` | query | Get vote counts for a sighting |
| `share.getSightingLink` | query | Generate shareable link data |
| `share.getPlateLinkData` | query | Generate shareable plate link data |
| `delta.since` | query | Fetch only sightings newer than a timestamp |
| `proximity.nearby` | query | Sightings near location since a given time |
| `export.plateHistory` | query | CSV or JSON export of plate history |
| `export.allSightings` | query | CSV or JSON export of all sightings |
| `anomaly.detect` | query | Detect teleporting vehicles, duplicate bursts, coordinated reports |
| `recentPlates.list` | query | Recently tracked plates |

---

### 7. AI/ML Integrations

**Model**: Gemini 2.5 Flash via `forge.manus.im/v1/chat/completions` (Manus platform API)

**Two AI routes:**

1. **`vehicleAI.analyzePhoto`** — Full multimodal vision analysis. Returns:
   - License plate text
   - Vehicle make/model/color/type
   - Agency type (ICE/CBP/DHS/FBI/DEA/ATF/USMS/Other)
   - Agency markings description
   - Badge number
   - Uniform description
   - Confidence score (0-1)

2. **`alpr.extractPlate`** — Focused ALPR. Returns plate text, confidence, and raw response.

**Also available** (framework-level, not yet used in app routes):
- Image generation (`server/_core/imageGeneration.ts`)
- Voice transcription via Whisper (`server/_core/voiceTranscription.ts`)

---

### 8. Environment Variables

From `server/_core/env.ts` and `server/README.md`:

| Variable | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `DATABASE_URL` | MySQL/TiDB connection string |
| `JWT_SECRET` | Session cookie signing secret |
| `VITE_APP_ID` | Manus OAuth app ID |
| `OAUTH_SERVER_URL` | Manus OAuth backend URL |
| `OWNER_OPEN_ID` | Owner's Manus ID (auto-grants admin role) |
| `BUILT_IN_FORGE_API_URL` | Manus Forge LLM API base URL |
| `BUILT_IN_FORGE_API_KEY` | Manus Forge API key (used for LLM + S3 storage) |
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_ID` | Client-side app ID for OAuth |
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` | Client-side API server URL |
| `EXPO_PUBLIC_OAUTH_PORTAL_URL` | Login portal URL |

No `.env.example` file exists — environment variable documentation lives only in `server/README.md`.

### 9. Documentation Files

- **`design.md`** — Complete UI/UX design spec: color scheme, all screen designs with layout descriptions, key user flows (4 flows), community verification system spec, credibility score algorithm, technical considerations for GPS/camera/maps/privacy
- **`todo.md`** — Feature checklist. Nearly everything is checked off. Outstanding items: ALPR testing with varied plate formats, face redaction (deferred), and several mobile web UX improvements (larger tap targets, better swipeable cards)
- **`server/README.md`** — Comprehensive backend developer guide: auth flows, database usage, tRPC patterns, LLM/storage/voice/image integration examples, all environment variables, test patterns

---

### Key Architectural Notes

1. **Anonymous-first**: No user auth required for the core features. Auth infrastructure exists (Manus OAuth) but all app routes use `publicProcedure`. Device fingerprinting handles anti-spam voting.

2. **Web-first execution**: Despite being Expo/React Native, all critical logic uses web APIs (`navigator.geolocation`, `Notification API`, `MediaDevices`, `localStorage`). The camera, map, and notifications only work on web.

3. **Real-time via polling**: No WebSockets. The map screen polls every 10 seconds via `setInterval`. Delta updates via `delta.since` minimize data transfer.

4. **Offline support**: `lib/sightings-cache.ts` uses AsyncStorage to cache sightings for instant loading before API response arrives.

5. **Smart anomaly detection**: Server-side algorithms detect teleporting vehicles (>200km in <1h), duplicate submission bursts (3+ same plate/location in 5min), and coordinated false reporting (10+ sightings at same location with <3 unique plates).
